name: Pyromancer
bio: A fire-wracked zealot who laughs through the smoke, burning everything just to feel alive.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage to opponent equal to 170% of Magic Power + 50.

skills.name: Bombard
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage to opponent equal to 60% of Magic Power 5 times.

skills.name: Empty Slot
skills.description: This character has no fourth ability.

ultimate.name: Inferno
ultimate.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to 240% of Magic Power, then permanently reduce the enemy's Armor and Magic Resist by 35% (additively).
